PAZAAK.settingLanguageHint: Interface language for the Pazaak module.
PAZAAK.settingTableNameHint: Name of the RollTable used as the main Pazaak deck (cards 1–10).
PAZAAK.settingFallbackHandHint: RollTable for special hand cards (fallback when no actor-specific deck exists).
PAZAAK.settingHandPrefixHint: Module looks for a table named 'PREFIX + ActorName'. E.g. 'Pazaak - ' → 'Pazaak - Revan'.
PAZAAK.settingHandSizeHint: Number of special cards dealt to each player's hand before the match.
PAZAAK.settingMaxHandPlaysHint: How many times a player can play a hand card during the match/round.
PAZAAK.settingHandLimitScopeHint: Whether the hand card limit applies to the whole match or resets each round.
PAZAAK.settingRedrawHandHint: If enabled, a new hand is dealt at the start of each new round.
PAZAAK.settingShowDeckNameHint: Display the hand deck name next to each player's name during the game.
PAZAAK.settingDeckSizeLimitHint: Required number of cards when building a deck in the Deck Generator (default 10).
PAZAAK.settingTargetHint: Score players are trying to reach (default 20).
PAZAAK.settingRoundsToWinHint: How many rounds must be won to win the match (default 3).
PAZAAK.settingResetHint: Restore all Pazaak module settings to their default values.
PAZAAK.confirmResetDefaultsBody: Are you sure you want to restore all Pazaak settings to their default values?
PAZAAK.notifResetDone: Pazaak: settings have been reset to defaults.
PAZAAK.noGame: Select at least 2 tokens on the scene and click Start.
PAZAAK.waitingForGM: Waiting for the GM to start a game…
PAZAAK.playerPickMode: Let players choose their own decks
PAZAAK.playerPickModeHint: Each player will be shown a deck selection dialog before the match starts.
PAZAAK.pickDeckHint: Select the hand deck to use in this match:
PAZAAK.notifNeedTokens: Pazaak: select at least 2 tokens to start a match.
PAZAAK.notifNoPlayer: Pazaak: player not found in game state.
PAZAAK.notifNoHandTable: Pazaak: no hand deck for "{name}" and no fallback "{fallback}". Run game.pazaak.setup() or create the table manually.
PAZAAK.notifInsufficientFunds: Pazaak: {name} does not have enough {currency} ({balance} < {amount}). Match cancelled.
PAZAAK.chatInsufficientFunds: ❌ Match cancelled — {name} does not have enough {currency} (has {balance}, needs {amount}).
PAZAAK.notifHandLimitWarn: {name}: hand card limit ({max}) for this {scope} exhausted.
PAZAAK.notifSetupGMOnly: Pazaak: only the GM can run setup.
PAZAAK.confirmResetBody: Are you sure you want to reset the match?
PAZAAK.confirmNewMatchBody: A game is in progress. Reset and start a new one?
PAZAAK.settingWagerCurrencyHint: Currency used for wagers. Auto-detected based on the active game system.
PAZAAK.wagerHint: 0 = no wager. Each player pays this amount; winner takes the whole pot.
PAZAAK.chatWagerDeducted: 💰 Wager of {amount} {currency} deducted from each player.
PAZAAK.chatWagerRefunded: 💰 Match forfeited — wager of {amount} {currency} refunded to each player.
PAZAAK.deckBuilderExactCards: Pazaak: deck must contain exactly {required} cards (currently {count}).
PAZAAK.deckBuilderNoSource: Standard deck table not found. Run game.pazaak.setup() first.
PAZAAK.deckBuilderNeedName: Pazaak: enter a name for the new deck.
PAZAAK.deckBuilderNoCards: Pazaak: select at least one card.
PAZAAK.deckBuilderNameTaken: Pazaak: a table named "{name}" already exists.
PAZAAK.chatWagerTied: 🤝 Tie — wager of {amount} {currency} refunded to each player.
